title: 🚨 NWS Unknown: Avalanche Warning
summary:
SABAFC

The following message is transmitted at the request of the
Valdez Avalanche Center.

...THE VALDEZ AVALANCHE CENTER HAS ISSUED AN AVALANCHE WARNING...

* WHAT... Wet heavy snow and strong southeasterly winds are
overloading a weak snowpack. Very dangerous avalanche conditions
exist.

* WHERE...For the mountains surrounding the Valdez and Thompson
Pass area, including Ernestine.

* WHEN....

title: 🚨 NWS Severe: High Wind Watch
summary:
* WHAT...South to southwest winds 35 to 55 mph, with gusts up to 70
to 80 mph possible.

* WHERE...Nikolski and Unalaska.

* WHEN...From Saturday evening through Sunday afternoon.

cause power outages. Travel could be difficult.

title: 🚨 NWS Moderate: Wind Advisory
summary:
* WHAT...South winds 35 to 45 mph with gusts up to 65 mph expected.

* WHERE...Eastern Alaska Range North of Trims Camp.

* WHEN...Until 4 PM AKDT Friday.

* IMPACTS...Gusty winds will blow around unsecured objects. Tree
limbs could be blown down and a few power outages may result.
Winds this strong can make driving difficult, especially for high
profile vehicles. Use extra caution.
sourceAttribution: Source: National Weather Service CAP Feed
